issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Shopping cart store with add/remove/update quantity
scenarios.rationale: Baseline defaults to Zustand or useReducer rather than Valtio idioms, while treatment uses the documented proxy() + direct mutation (push/splice, item.quantity = n) + useSnapshot() pattern straight from the skill.

scenarios.name: Persist user preferences (theme, language, sidebar) to localStorage
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to wire persistence inside a component useEffect or pick a different library, while treatment uses the skill's proxy() + subscribe() side effect to write to localStorage and useSnapshot() in components.
